name: jat13
description: JAT 13 (Aurora) — job auto-apply: thin extension + app brain, adapters-as-data. Ground-up rebuild of v11.

scripts.dist: npm run build && cd app && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:publish: npm run build && cd app && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish always
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p shared/tsconfig.json && tsc -p app/tsconfig.json && tsc -p extension/tsconfig.json
scripts.gates: node tools/validate-versions.mjs --check && node tools/validate-extension.mjs && node tools/validate-adapters.mjs
